titleStmt.title: SII 20.229: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 229. (B.K. No. 130 of 1935-36.) BANAVĀSI, SIRSI TALUK, NORTH KANARA DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab set up to the left of Vīrabhadra shrine in the compound of the Madhukēśvara temple.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 1290, Kīlaka, Vaiśākha, ba. 30, Monday, Solar eclipse. The date is irregular. In the given year the tithi corresponded to A.D. 1368, May 17, Wednesday (not Monday) and there was no eclipse on that day. It may be noted, however, that on Jyeshṭha ba. 30 of the following year i.e., Saumya, there occurred a solar eclipse when the tithi commenced on Monday at, ·14 and lasted till ·11 of Tuesday, the 5th June, A.D. 1369, when the solar eclipse occurred.

The inscription states that when Mahāpradhāna Mādhavāṅka was governing Banavāsi 12000 province, Nāgappa, the son of Prabhu Śivadēva of Raṭṭakallu installed an image of god Vīrēśvara in the vicinity of Madhukanātha at Banavāsi, and made a grant of a village and money to the god. The grant was entrusted to Bikkidēva-oḍeya, the son of Lākuḷēśvaradēva-oḍeya. The latter is described as Kādaṁbarāya-kul-āchārya.
The king is stated to be ruling from Hastināvatipura.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trai
lōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti
śrīmanumahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara Ārirāyavibhā
ḍa bhāsege tappuva rāyara gaṁḍa pūrvvapaści
masamudrādhipati śrī vīraborkarāya nu hastiRead bukkarāya.
nāvatipuradalli sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeI
Uttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi svasti śrīmanu mahāpraThe letter re is written above the line.
dhānaṁ mādhavāṁkanu banavaseya panichāsiramanā
ḷuva kāladalli svasti śrī jayābhyudaya sakavaruṣa 1290 ne
ya kīlaka saṁvatsarada vayisākha ba 30 sōmavāra sūryya
grahaṇa saṁkrāṁti vyatīpāta kūḍidaṁthā pu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalu svaThe letter ṇa is written above the line.
sti sumadhigatapaṁcamahāsabda mahāmahēsvaraṁ śrī baṁka
nāthadēvara dibyaśrīpādapadmārādhakanumappa ṟaṭṭakalda(lla) prabhu
sivadēvaṁgaḷa maga nāgappanu banavaseya madhukanāthadēva
ra samīpadalli śrī vīrēsvaradēvara pratiṣṭheyanū māḍi svasti
śrī jayaṁtīpuravarādhīśvara śrī madhukanāthadēvara dibya
śrīpādapadmārādhakarumappa rāyarājaguru bhūmaṁ
ḍaḷācāryya sivasamayavārdhivardhanaśaraścaṁdracaṁdrikāprabhā
varuṁ madanamadagarvvaparvvatanivāraṇapramōdaruṁ kādaṁbarāyaku
lācāryyarumappa lākuḷēśvaradēvaOḍeyara kumāra bikkidēva
vaḍeyara kayyalu Ā banavaseya Eṁṭu hiṭṭu paṁcamaṭhada sa
dalu Ā vīrēsvaradēvarige Aṁgaraṁgabhōga naḍavaṁtāgi U
gaṇa gada kaḍagōḍa grāma 1 nu
ma Oḷagāda varaha ga 100 nūṟu
Ā bikkidēvaOḍeyara kaiyalu nāgarasanu koṭṭu
rige naivēdya naṁdāvaḷa pūjāriya jitasatra
damaged
Digital edition of SII 20.229 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
